name: groupBy
description: The standalone lodash.groupby package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want lodash's grouping behavior without another npm dependency.
tagline: Group items by an iteratee result.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.groupby file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to preserve lodash's grouping contract locally instead of rewriting reduce-based groupers ad hoc.
nativeAlternative: Array reduce can implement grouping, but teams often prefer to keep an existing lodash grouping contract rather than rewriting it repeatedly.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
